title: Commissioning Manager — HVAC & Mechanical Services (Contract)
description_raw:
Petrofac are seeking an experienced Commissioning Manager to lead mechanical and HVAC systems commissioning activities on a major power station brownfield upgrade project in Teesside. This is a contract position engaged outside IR35 via your own limited company.

The scope covers:
- Mechanical and HVAC commissioning packages across the main process building
- Boiler plant, compressed air systems, and cooling water systems
- Coordination with the energy management and control systems teams
- Witnessing performance tests and issuing punch list clearances

Key responsibilities:
- Lead commissioning team of 12 technicians on site
- Own the commissioning schedule and report weekly to the Programme Director
- Manage pre-commissioning checks, loop checks, and functional tests
- Issue commissioning completion certificates (ITR A, B, C)
- Coordinate with the operations team for handover and first-fire activities

Profile:
- HNC/HND Mechanical Engineering minimum; CEng (MIMechE) preferred
- 10+ years commissioning HVAC and mechanical plant in energy or industrial sector

Rate: £500/day outside IR35
Start: ASAP — target 3 weeks
Duration: 8 months
Location: Teesside — site-based
